2377920.name: Perseus
2377920.description: Perseus is a 2D Roguelike that tells the story of a boy trying to rescue his mother from an evil king by completing the task that the king has given him - killing Medusa. Dive deep into dungeons, slay monsters in turn-based combat, and gain power before coming face to face with the greatest evil you've seen yet. Can you save your mother or will you die trying?
2377920.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
